The Problem

One-Time Cleaning
Isn't Enough

Playgrounds require recurring maintenance to remain clean, safe, and professionally maintained year-round.

🦠

Bacteria Returns Quickly

High-touch playground surfaces require recurring sanitation to maintain safe conditions.

☀️

LA Climate Accelerates Grime

Los Angeles heat, dust, and UV exposure accelerate playground surface wear and buildup.

📋

Cleaner & Safer Facilities

Recurring maintenance programs help facilities maintain cleaner, safer playground environments.

⚙️

Surfaces Deteriorate Faster

Regular maintenance helps extend playground appearance and surface longevity.

Why Facilities Stay With ECO IDEA

Designed for Long-Term
Facility Partnerships

Built for schools, daycare centers, HOAs, parks, and municipal facilities that need a reliable recurring maintenance partner.

Consistent Scheduling

Reliable recurring maintenance without service gaps — your facility runs on a schedule you can count on.

Child-Safe Sanitization

EPA-approved sanitation systems designed specifically for playground environments and child-use surfaces.

Commercial Equipment

Professional-grade systems designed for commercial facility maintenance.

Service Documentation

Every visit documented for maintenance tracking and facility accountability — ready for audits and reporting.

Dedicated Account Manager

A single point of contact for your facility — fast communication, no delays, no call centers.

Scalable Programs

From single campuses to multi-site district contracts — our systems scale with your facilities and budget.
